articles.title: Longoni claims Rabiot ‘wants to join Napoli’ and continue with Allegri
articles.summary: Adrien Rabiot has been linked with a move to Napoli this summer, as Max Allegri is taking over there, and Andrea Longoni is claiming that the Frenchman will push for that outcome.  Rabiot was brought in at the end of the transfer window last summer, being a direct request of the head coach Allegri.

articles.title: A month until the meeting and Milan are not there: Cardinale's ten days have become (at least) eighteen
articles.summary: From May 25th, the day Gerry Cardinale fired everyone, to today, it seems like we're always writing the same things.

articles.title: Galliani's emotion in remembering Berlusconi: "Always in my heart"
articles.summary: For three years now, June 12th has no longer been a day like any other, in particular for AC Milan fans or those who worked there and played there between 1986 and 2017.
